race.comment: TERRORTORIAN (7) presents second up here off a very impressive win first up at this track over 1400m, coming right away to score by 2.75 lengths after showing a neat turn of foot. He should strip fitter and the slight rise in trip will only suit better.  IL CIELO (1) is racing in fine form, too strong at Geelong in this grade over 1443m last time. Tough draw but he should be right there again. ELEGANT CONTESSA (10) will be hard fit after getting the maiden out of the way here last time and has claims while LICENSE TO EXCITE (9) has won two on the bounce and draws for a soft run. Include both in exotics.
